title: com.temis.decision.failed.v1
description: Data payload of a temis command-failure event (ADR-0033), written by temis-clio-worker when a command cannot be evaluated (unresolved model/flow, compile or runtime error). It closes the loop — every command is answered, with a result or a failure — and carries no outputs.

error.description: Human-readable reason the command could not be evaluated.

modelId.description: The requested model id, if any.

flowId.description: The requested flow id, if any.

decision.description: The requested decision name, if any.

input.description: The requested input, carried for diagnosis.

requestId.description: Correlation id (ADR-0033): the clio event id of the command this failure answers.
